title: zootrophion dodsonii
intro: Zootrophion dodsonii, also known as the Dodson's Zootrophion, is a species of orchid native to Ecuador. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Zootrophion dodsonii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its flowers, leaves, and roots, and are often used in traditional medicine to create teas, infusions, and tinctures.
